name: courthouse-chamber
summary: A courthouse hearing chamber. Raised judge's bench, witness dock, clerk's desk, rows of benches for the public, a prisoner's railing at the front. Weight of law in the air.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with bench elevated at one end, public seating opposite

primary_palette.note: classic courtroom — judge elevated, witness box, public benches
civil court — lectern for advocates, no prisoner dock

story_prompts: murder trial — prisoner in the dock, witnesses queued, public benches packed
empty chamber — dawn before first session, clerk arranging documents
corrupt verdict — judge pronouncing, accused shouting, guards moving in
sanctuary petition — a refugee at the lectern, judge listening skeptically

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: cold formal light (0.45) — tall windows implied, chandelier overhead

anti_patterns: judge's bench elevated — place against the back wall, never mid-floor
public benches face the bench — don't scatter or angle them
central aisle must be clear — prisoner walks it from door to dock
